children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a review of a housing plan submitted to the Secretary under to ensure that the plan complies with the requirements of that section.section 4223 of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: B Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall have the discretion to review a plan referred to in subparagraph (A) only to the extent that the Secretary considers that the review is necessary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Not later than 60 days after receiving a plan under , the Secretary shall notify the Director of the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands whether the plan complies with the requirements under that section.section 4223 of this title

children.heading: Effect of failure of Secretary to take action
children.label: B Effect of failure of Secretary to take action
i
children.text: the plan shall be considered to have been determined to comply with the requirements under ; andsection 4223 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the Director shall be considered to have been notified of compliance.

children.heading: Notice of reasons for determination of noncompliance
children.label: b Notice of reasons for determination of noncompliance

children.text: any modifications necessary for the plan to meet the requirements of .section 4223 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: set forth the information required by to be contained in the housing plan;section 4223 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: are consistent with information and data available to the Secretary; and

children.label: C
children.text: are not prohibited by or inconsistent with any provision of this chapter or any other applicable law.

children.heading: Incomplete plans
children.label: 2 Incomplete plans
children.text: If the Secretary determines under this subsection that any of the appropriate certifications required under are not included in a plan, the plan shall be considered to be incomplete.section 4223(c)(2)(E) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), after a plan under has been submitted for a fiscal year, the Director of the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands may comply with the provisions of that section for any succeeding fiscal year (with respect to information included for the 5-year period under or for the 1-year period under ) by submitting only such information regarding such changes as may be necessary to update the plan previously submitted.section 4223 of this titlesection 4223(b) of this titlesection 4223(c) of this title

children.heading: Complete plans
children.label: 2 Complete plans
children.text: The Director shall submit a complete plan under not later than 4 years after submitting an initial plan under that section, and not less frequently than every 4 years thereafter.section 4223 of this title

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: e Effective date
children.text: This section and shall take effect on the date provided by the Secretary pursuant to section 4227(a) of this title to provide for timely submission and review of the housing plan as necessary for the provision of assistance under this subchapter for fiscal year 2001.section 4223 of this title1So in original. Probably should be section “4227”.1
